Headline: #79 79th Temporary Westbound Reroute at 79th/Essex
ShortDescription: Westbound #79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted via 79th, South Shore, 75th, Yates, then resume their normal route on 79th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Westbound #79 79th buses are temporarily rerouted via 79th, South Shore, 75th, Yates, then resume their normal route on 79th.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near 79th/Essex.
